zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean I de Luxembourg於1313年出生在法國洛萊姆斯時，他的父親Waleran II de Luxembourg39歲，母親Guyotte de Lille33歲。他和Alix of Dampierre至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1364年5月17日在法國享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean I de Luxembourg于1313年出生在法国洛萊姆斯时，他的父亲Waleran II de Luxembourg39岁，母亲Guyotte de Lille33岁。他和Alix of Dampierre至少有1个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1364年5月17日在法国享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean I de Luxembourg was born in 1313, in Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Waleran II de Luxembourg, was 39 and his mother, Guyotte de Lille, was 33. He had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Alix of Dampierre. He died on 17 May 1364, in France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean I de Luxembourg est né en 1313, à Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Waleran II de Luxembourg, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Guyotte de Lille, avait 33 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles avec Alix of Dampierre. Il est décédé le 17 mai 1364, à France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean I de Luxembourg 1313 in Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Waleran II de Luxembourg 39 und seine Mutter Guyotte de Lille 33. Er hatte mit Alix of Dampierre mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 17. Mai 1364 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Luxembourg è nato il nel 1313 nel Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Waleran II de Luxembourg, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Guyotte de Lille, aveva 33 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie con Alix of Dampierre. Morì il 17 maggio 1364, nel Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.Ligny-en-Barrois, Meuse, Grand Est, Fran: フランスグランド エストメウゼリグニー-エン-バーロイス

ja.Phalempin, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードファレンパン
ja.lifeSummary: Jean I de Luxembourgが1313年にフランスロレィヌメウゼで生まれた時，父Waleran II de Luxembourgは39歳，母Guyotte de Lilleは33歳であった。彼はAlix of Dampierreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1364年5月17日にフランスで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean I de Luxembourg(이)가 1313년 프랑스 로레이인 우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Waleran II de Luxembourg(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Guyotte de Lille(은)는 33세였다. 그는 Alix of Dampierre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1364년 5월 17일 프랑스에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean I de Luxembourg nasceu em 1313, em Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Waleran II de Luxembourg, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Guyotte de Lille, tinha 33 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas com Alix of Dampierre. Ele faleceu em 17 de maio de 1364, em França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean I de Luxembourg родился в 1313 г. в местности меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Waleran II de Luxembourg было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Guyotte de Lille, 33. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери от Alix of Dampierre. Он умер 17 мая 1364 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 51 год.

sm.from 1330 to 1340: mai le 1330 e o'o I le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean I de Luxembourg nació en 1313, en Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Waleran II de Luxembourg, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Guyotte de Lille, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas con Alix of Dampierre. Murió el 17 de mayo de 1364, en Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
